content: We can reframe the basic Self-Refine framework as a scaffold that can be augmented with multiple inconsistent perspective sampling from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-iteration multi-perspective self-improvement loop for LLMs that still retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of needing no extra supervision or training. This hybrid framework lets LLMs catch blind spots a single-perspective Self-Refine would miss, without abandoning the simplicity that makes original Self-Refine accessible to deploy.
